Dashboard Archive: 2026-03-30 Home
About This Dashboard
What It Does
Short-term momentum ranker scoring 700+ tickers on returns (1d to 1y), SMA gate (above 30/50/100/200 day), ratio consistency across timeframes, and resilience on bad SPY days. Higher composite scores indicate stronger, more consistent short-term momentum.
Today's Reading
# Market Analysis: Momentum-Ranker Dashboard Today's data shows two exceptionally strong momentum performers dominating the rankings. EC ranks first with a composite score of 94.8, driven by consistent gains across all timeframes (1.3% to 61.42%) and perfect marks on all four SMA gates, though its 1-year return of 46.2% shows momentum has decelerated recently relative to shorter periods. GPRE follows closely with explosive long-term performance—a 223.15% one-year return dwarfs EC's gains—yet its negative bad_spy_score of -0.4525 (versus EC's strong 0.8826) indicates it struggles more on down-market days, a potential resilience weakness despite superior absolute returns. Both stocks maintain healthy ratio consistency (4 out of 5 passes each) and significantly outpace major indices across multiple timeframes, with GPRE's 1-year performance beating SPY by 211 percentage points. The correlation patterns suggest both have meaningful exposure to energy and commodities sectors (XLE correlation around 0.39-0.44) while showing negative correlations with bonds and healthcare, indicating they benefit from inflation/reflation narratives rather than broad market diversification.
